Free Gym Bag Offer (Optimum Nutrition)

  • Add products worth ₹12,999 or more to your cart to unlock a Free Gym Bag.
  • Offer valid on net cart value after discount
  • Cart must include at least one product from Optimum Nutrition Creatine, Multivitamins, Fish Oil, ZMA, or Pre-Workout categories to be eligible for the Free Gym Bag. Eligible combos containing these products will also qualify.
  • Offer is applicable only on Optimum Nutrition products and not valid on Isopure products.
  • In case the cart contains both Optimum Nutrition and Isopure products, only Optimum Nutrition product value will be considered for eligibility.
  • The Free Gym Bag will be automatically added to the cart once the minimum value is met.
  • Only one Free Gym Bag will be provided per order, irrespective of cart value.
  • Offer valid till stocks last.
  • In case of order cancellation/return reducing cart value below ₹12,999, the free gift will not be applicable.
  • Gold Standard 100% Whey (Double Rich Chocolate) – 2 lbs and 5 lbs variants that come with a Free RCB Shaker and Gold Standard 100% Whey unflavoured 2 lbs with ON storm shaker are excluded from the Free Gym Bag promotion and will not be considered towards cart value eligibility for this offer
  • Brand reserves the right to modify or withdraw the offer.

FREE RCB Funnel on Select Combos

Free Shaker with 4kg Chocolate & Vanilla flavour

Free Shaker on buying Gold Standard Whey 5 lbs - Chocolate & Vanilla

Free Shipping on all orders above Rs 1000

    1. Home
    2. Micronised Creatine Powder | Unflavoured | 250 g
    Skip to product information
    1 / of 11

    Product Specifications

    Flavour Unflavoured
    Key Ingredient Creatine Monohydrate (100%)
    Benefit Muscle Size, Strength & Athletic Performance.
    Suitable For Healthy Adults
    Target audience Unisex
    Product Weight 250 g (8.8 oz)
    Servings in the pack 83
    Shelf life 18 months

    Product Overview

    • Muscle Size, Strength & Performance

      Creatine monohydrate has been extensively studied and shown to help support athletic performance, power and recovery when taken over time along with regular resistance exercise¹.

    Benefits

    • Consists of 100% Creatine Monohydrate. Unflavoured for ease of stacking with other flavoured sports nutrition supplements.
    • 3 Grams of Pure Creatine Monohydrate per serving to support athletic performance and power.¹ ²
    • Helps Support ATP Recycling.¹ ²
    • Micronized for easy mixing.
    • Informed Choice Certified. Banned Substance Tested.
    • Power-up your post workout protein shake or weight gainer shake with 1 scoop of Micronised Creatine Powder.
    • For EXISTING STICKERS- SMS ON {SPACE} your 6-digit unique code on the pack at 57575 or visit our website authenticateon.in & For NEW STICKERS- SCAN: the QR code to go to the landing page, SCRATCH: the silver strip to reveal the 6-digit unique code, VERIFY: on the landing page input your 6-digit code and your mobile number to Authenticate your Optimum Nutrition Product. #ScanScratchVerify

    Suggested Use

    • Add 3g (About 1 Scoop) of micronised creatine powder to a protein shake or a glass of your favourite flavoured beverage. Mix it up with a spoon. Tip: Power-up your protein, meal replacement, and weight-gainer shakes with 1 scoop of Micronised Creatine Powder.
    • 1 serving per day
    • Not For medicinal Use. For healthy adults, use this product as a nutraceutical only. This product is not a sole source of nutrition and should be consumed in combination with a nutritious diet and appropriate physical training or exercise program. Do not exceed the stated recommended daily usage.

    Nutritional Information

    D
    Dr. Rajesh Yadav
    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Micronised Creatine – Highly Recommended!

    I bought Optimum Nutrition Micronised Creatine Powder (Unflavoured, 250g) and I’m really impressed with it. The mixability is awesome — it dissolves quickly with no grit, sandy texture, or muddy feel, which is much better than the MuscleBlaze creatine I used before.
    After using it regularly for just 5 days, I’ve already noticed a good increase in my strength and workout performance. It’s completely unflavoured, easy to mix in water or shakes, and I experienced no bloating or discomfort.
    Overall, it’s a high-quality, effective creatine that delivers results. Definitely worth buying!

    S
    Sabya
    Absolutely great product

    Great product for increasing strength and performance. Must have supplement

    D
    Deepak Kumar
    Must have

    P

    S

    Creatine is worth the amount and tbh it mizes so well with everything. And it's giving good results in my performance.

    ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Micronised Creatine – Highly Recommended!

    I bought Optimum Nutrition Micronised Creatine Powder (Unflavoured, 250g) and I’m really impressed with it. The mixability is awesome — it dissolves quickly with no grit, sandy texture, or muddy feel, which is much better than the MuscleBlaze creatine I used before.
    After using it regularly for just 5 days, I’ve already noticed a good increase in my strength and workout performance. It’s completely unflavoured, easy to mix in water or shakes, and I experienced no bloating or discomfort.
    Overall, it’s a high-quality, effective creatine that delivers results. Definitely worth buying!
